string.text: %c[255,248,153,26]Developer:\n%c[default]Welcome to the Anthology mod! Check your PDA, go to the "Guide" section, there you'll find all the information about the mod - good hunting, stalker.
%c[255,248,153,26]Developer:\n%c[default]You have chosen Freeplay mode. The storyline "Living Legend" is now available. - good hunting, stalker.
